══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Orc — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):8+1=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 4/5 targets affected.
